programme.title: The Big Gay Sketch Show
programme.desc: The ladies of The View chat about their experiences going gay for Gay Pride Month, folk group Sappho's Lips performs at a hot dog eating contest, and an accident-prone wedding planner ruins a wedding.

programme.title: The Big Gay Sketch Show
programme.desc: Tyra Banks hosts Canada's Next Top Model, The L Word commemorative plates prove to be popular among lesbians, and an offensive lounge singer disrupts patrons. Appearances by Rosie O'Donnell & Sharon Osbourne.

programme.title: The Big Gay Sketch Show
programme.desc: The women of The View discuss gay divorces, an Afghani girl celebrates her 16th birthday, and Fitzwilliam appears on the Dr. Phil show. Appearances by Rosie O'Donnell & Sharon Osbourne.

programme.title: The Big Gay Sketch Show
programme.desc: Suze Orman gives financial advice to shoppers, an obsessive-compulsive television host roasts a turkey on her cooking show, and a couple spends the day assembling an IKEA bookcase.

programme.title: J. Lo: Let's Get Real
programme.desc: Her talents go from acting, to fashion, dancing and singing. With a net worth over 250 million dollars, J.Lo has conquered the Latin American and pop music scene.

programme.title: Miley Cyrus: Xplicit
programme.desc: Singer, actress, controversial pop star. Miley Cyrus has become one of the most talked about celebrities in the world. From Disney's Hanna Montana to her latest single 'Wrecking Ball', Miley has transformed her image radically.

programme.title: Lady Gaga: One Sequin at a Time
programme.desc: Lady Gaga- the worlds most talented and controversial pop star. Born and raised in New York City, Gaga started as an aspiring pianist and songwriter, having taught herself to play the piano at a very young age.

programme.title: Taylor Swift: America's Sweetheart
programme.desc: The country/pop superstar has taken the music scene by storm, going multi-platinum on her first album, earning four Grammy Awards for her second and being listed in the 2013 Forbes list of top-earning celebs under 30.

programme.title: Adele: Someone Like Me
programme.desc: At such a young age Adele has received iconic status from fans and industry professionals alike. With sold out concerts around the world and multiple awards to her name Adele came from humble beginnings and has gone on to be one of the biggest Artists.

programme.title: Prick Up Your Ears
programme.desc: The true story of British playwright Joe Orton and how his skyrocket to fame ended in his own brutal, shocking murder by his longtime lover in 1967.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens are challenged to perform a choreographed routine in a live drag dance spectacular. With guest judges Alyssa Milano (Charmed) and comedian Rachael Harris (The Hangover).

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in a pageant of Hello Kitty inspired couture. Rebecca Romijn (X-Men) and former Drag Race panelist Santino Rice guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens compete in their final challenge - starring in the music video for RuPaul's hit 'Born Naked.' Michelle Visage, Carson Kressley and Ross Mathews judge.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Momma Dee's latest drama leaves Scrappy dead on arrival. Yandy takes a gamble meeting with Samantha & Kisha. Erica calls Karlie's bluff at brunch, but goes all in when she finds out Safaree isn't riding solo in Vegas.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Tears turn to gasps when Safaree brings an uninvited guest to Shekinah's Crying Tour. Scrappy & Bambi try to meet in the middle on Momma Dee. Karlie's surprise pool party makes some waves and sinks her and Sierra's friendship for good.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Atlanta
programme.desc: Grammy night has arrived and Spice's nerves are on TEN. Scrappy has the palace under siege when he finally confronts Momma Dee about her meddling. Erica's divorce saga is finally over, but an unexpected settlement leaves her speechless.

programme.desc: Teairra Mari tries to hold on to her undying love for Ray J. Soulja Boy and Nia decide to build a future together. Omarion and Apryl are expecting their first child but Omarion's mother stands in their way. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Zenigata has been invited to an international police convention in Europe; his chief wants him to go, but Zenigata does not want to since Lupin has declared that he will steal a gold bust within the next three days.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko goads Lupin into stealing a large shipment of diamonds. Lupin takes the task despite Jigen's protest that Fujiko is playing them for fools. Of course, Jigen is right.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Fujiko invites Lupin and the gang to a famous nightclub owned by the sexy Hoshikage Rinko. Only Goemon refuses. This was a wise move as Rinko places timebombs on Fujiko, Jigen, and Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Smith is an art thief that is selling stolen paintings under the guise of a beauty contest. Lupin decides he wants in on the action as well, promising to steal away the treasured paintings.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Inspector Ganimard III is the grandson of Lupin I's archnemesis. He has come to Japan as the head of security for the 1972 France Fair but also intends to restore his family's honor by arresting Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Someone is committing thefts under Lupin's name. Lupin follows the imposters back to their island hideout. He has apparently stumbled into a whole island of thieves.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Rie is being held captive though she does not realize it. She believes the man holding her is a friend of her father, Ken Makita. Lupin shows up to rescue her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: Gordon, an FBI computer specialist, is in Japan to operate a computer capable of predicting crimes and determining how to stop them. The Metropolitan Police Department hopes that this will finally help them capture Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 1
programme.desc: A disputed horde of recently discovered ancient gold coins draws the attention of Lupin and company. As the ownership of the coins is disputed, Lupin decides to settle the matter on his own by stealing them from the Dai Nippon Bank.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's been a long time since Jigen, Goemon and Fujiko have heard from Lupin. Then one day, they each receive an invitation from Lupin for a reunion aboard the luxury liner Sirloin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An international soccer game is taking place in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil and Lupin has his eyes on the box office and betting takes. Will the box office heist go as planned?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An old man who supposedly knows the secret to Hitler's legacy lives in East Germany within the Berlin Wall. Lupin and his gang track the old man down, but the old man can't recall anything about any legacy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: At Loch Ness in Scotland, the mysterious monster Nessie reveals itself from the lake, charmed by Fujiko's singing. Seeing this, Doctor Oz decides to use Fujiko to capture Nessie for his personal gain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko and a mystery man have an enticing job for Lupin: Stealing a ton of gold bullion from a Swiss Bank, a bank renowned for its tight security. Can it be done? What is the mystery man's true identity?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A man is threatening to destroy the Leaning Tower of Pisa with a device that generates artificial earthquakes. The Italian government has no choice but to meet the culprit's, but Lupin takes the ransom for himself!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/8/22: Down four runs late, Seattle rallies back with a four-run 8th inning and Adam Frazier drives in the winning run with an RBI double in the 9th to send the Mariners to the American League Divisional Series.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/11/22: After being down four runs in the 8th inning, Yordan Alvarez crushes a walk-off three-run homer in the 9th to lift the Astros to victory in Game 1 of the ALDS against the Mariners.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/19/22: Manny Machado rips three hits and a home run while Blake Snell strikes out six batters to lead the Padres to an 8-5 win over the Phillies in Game 2 of the NLCS.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/22/22: Rhys Hoskins, Kyle Schwarber and J.T. Realmuto all homer to help the Phillies outslug the Padres in a 10-6 NLCS Game 4 win.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Monster A-Go-Go
programme.desc: The search for an astronaut on an alien planet.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Violent Years
programme.desc: Jam Handy shows the world the glory of sexism with electric kitchen appliances and Ed Wood analyzes the world of criminals spoiled by their parents.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Werewolf
programme.desc: After digging up strange bones, a man becomes a werewolf.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Hillbillies, holo-clowns, and a giant leech named Patches abound when Joel and the Bots take on this bloodsucking tale from acclaimed producer/director Roger Corman.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: King Dinosaur
programme.desc: In King Dinosaur, the crew pokes fun as scientists are terrorized by snakes, bugs, and dinosaurs on a newly discovered planet.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: The Black Scorpion
programme.desc: Giant scorpions rise out of a volcano and attack Mexico in The Black Scorpion (1957) while the Bots throw a party for Joel.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Time of the Apes
programme.desc: Joel and the Bots watch a Japanese rip-off of Planet of the Apes, stage their own version of Inherit the Wind, and Crow shows off the latest in ape fashion.

programme.title: MST3K: Racket Girls
programme.desc: A gym owner gets into trouble, becoming the target of the mob and the law. The 1950 short presents a high school couple rushing into marriage, and the marriage counselor who talks them out of it.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It

programme.title: American Justice

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: In November 1995, close friends Halima Jones and Ruby Joyner went out shopping together in Peachtree City, Georgia, but never came home. An all-out manhunt was launched, and four days later, an abandoned mini-van was found.

programme.title: American Justice
programme.desc: Linda Sobek, a pretty, vivacious Los Angeles model turns up missing after a photo shoot. The police investigation leads to photographer Charles Rathbun, who, after much back-and-forth, says he killed her by accident.

programme.title: City Confidential
programme.desc: On November 29, 1992 the tiny town of Gibsonton, Florida was hurled into the national spotlight. It was the night that someone put three bullets into the head of Grady Stiles.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Ian takes a rusted-out 1960 Chevy Apache and takes off his favorite body panels to install over a 2005 long-bed Chevy.

programme.title: All Girls Garage

programme.title: All Girls Garage

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Ian doesn't like spending money on new trucks, so he just builds what he wants; today, he starts working on a custom frame to sit under a classic Jeepster Commando and outfits the suspension, along with getting new one-ton axles underneath.

programme.title: FourWheeler
programme.desc: Ian brings in a 1968 M715 to make it more reliable; he takes the body off the original chassis and stretches a Jeep JK chassis to make it fit; he adds upgraded suspension, 1-ton axles and an LS engine to make it a truck that can fight any battle.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Bogi and Faye describe a common failure problem on a fifth-generation Camaro. The torque converter can fail in the transmission, causing the car to shake at 40-50 mph. The girls upgrade the factory torque converter to fix this problem for good.

programme.title: All Girls Garage
programme.desc: Four gears are better than two, so the crew takes the old two-speed Powerglide out of a '67 Chevy Camaro and installs a Muncie four speed.

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.title: Car Fix

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la Biblia se relata una historia en la cual Jesús y sus discípulos un día se toparon con un paria que se encontraba poseído. Cuando Jesús le preguntó a ese hombre cómo se llamaba, este le respondió que, dentro de él.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando Clara y su familia se mudan a una pequeña casa en la zona rural de Hinsdale, Nueva York, se dan cuenta de que la paz de la vida en el campo es simplemente una ilusión y que la amenaza de muerte es muy real.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La casa de rancho de Ed y Beth parece el lugar perfecto para criar a su niño pequeño hasta que descubren que no están solos, y una espesa niebla oscura se cierne sobre la casa y crece día a día.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ciertos mitos nativos norteamericanos hablan de criaturas sobrenaturales que protegen a los muertos. Los primeros exploradores de algunas tribus algonquinas del noreste de los Estados Unidos contaban historias sobre hombres lobo.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El hogar debería ser un remanso de solaz, un refugio de los males externos. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando un terror paranormal lo invade, y el hogar se convierte en una prisión?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños son vitales. Palpitan en nuestros corazones, resuenan en nuestras mentes, nos impulsan hacia adelante hasta que convertimos nuestra imaginación en acción y damos aliento a nuestros destinos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Casi todo es excusa para celebrar en Ibiza. Los ibicencos celebran en la playa, en barcos y en villas. Una isla rica en historia antigua, los lugareños también celebran fiestas tradicionales en sus pueblos.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Esta es la legendaria St. Barts, una isla que ha combinado con éxito las tradiciones con el modernismo y sigue siendo un destino principal.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: Desde el comportamiento en sus manadas, pasando por esconderse a simple vista, hasta construir sólidas fortificaciones, los animales pueden defenderse sabiamente.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: Lago Turkana, el lago más grande en el valle de Rift en África. Se encuentra en el corazón de uno de los paisajes más difíciles del mundo, pero la vida allí encuentra un camino.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Dos de los carnívoros más poderosos de África impactan uno con otro en la sabana. Leones y hienas deben matar casi todos los días para mantener a grandes familias.

programme.desc: Ronnie Anne consigue la pasantía de su vida con Bruno. Carl sueña con participar en el espectáculo de medio tiempo en un partido de los Gatos y se infiltra con Alexis y la banda escolar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Bobby tienen que soportar a un viejo amigo de Arturo, Beto la Alpaca, pero él tiene otros planes. El abuelo ayuda CJ a construir un cohete, pero tiene que mentirle cuando todo sale mal, para que no pierda la fe en él.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y la pandilla van a participar en un nuevo video musical, pero las cosas se complican cuando un fantasma causa estragos en la sala de conciertos.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Carlos tiene que elegirle padrino a Carlitos para el bautizo. Carlota necesita un crédito de deportes para poder graduarse, ella y Ronnie Anne deben encontrar el equipo perfecto para Carlota.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Rosa elige la actividad familiar, observar aves en el bosque, pero todo sale mal cuando Sergio es confundido con una especie rara. Cansado de no tener espacio para él, Bobby se muda en secreto a otro apartamento.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne se entera de que en un pasado, Tio Carlos supo ser un famoso patinador y, a partir de ello, comienza a enseñarle movimientos.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid buscan una actividad que hacer juntos después de las clase, pero no encuentran nada que les vaya bien a los dos. Maria tiene, al fin, un día libre, pero Ronnie Anne debe competir con el resto de su familia para estar con ella.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid le enseñan a Adelaide sobre el Día de los Muertos para ayudarla a superar la muerte de su rana. Ronnie Anne renuncia a una tradición familiar de Halloween para asistir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: La familia descubre un increíble carrito de tamales e intenta mantenerlo en secreto ante la abuela. Ronnie Anne no cree en una predicción astrológica de que el amor la encontrará, hasta que parece hacerse realidad.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The last time Crystal was here, she got a DNA denial, but is back to test another potential father. Then, Aaron and his new girlfriend say there's no way Aaron is the father of Marissa's baby. What truths will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Waldo refuses to believe that he fathered Chelsea’s baby because of her pale complexion. Then, Kianna found pics of naked women in Nick’s phone and condoms and cologne in his gym bag. What will Maury’s lie detector results say?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mistie suspects that her boyfriend has been cheating, but she never expected with her best friend, Allison! Next Jose's 2 boyfriends didn't know that they've been sharing Jose. Finally, Antjuan hates that his girlfriend strips for a living.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Josh and Amy will find out today that their partners have been unfaithful. Next Madeline reveals to Andre that she's been sleeping with Diante. Then Quincy is engaged to Callie but she doesn't know that Quincy has been cheating with Amy.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Peggy's been married 4 times and says she suspects her husband, Chris, is cheating! Next Salina thinks that because her boyfriend is still sleeping with her and hasn't slept with his new girlfriend that he won't leave her. She is sorely mistaken.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Desiree and Kim have been dating Chango for 6 years! Next Mark's ex wants him back and even lied about a pregnancy. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Rachel wants to know whether her boyfriend is too good to be true. Letisse says her cab-driving boyfriend drove another woman around town for 10 hours.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Since the start of their relationship, Nareda has slowly been discovering more and more of Kenny's secrets. Now that she suspects he's been cheating, she wants the truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Seth exploits women for money and pleasure, causing Christie immense suffering. She wants to break free from his abuse and low self-esteem. With Steve's assistance, she seeks the strength and motivation to leave this toxic relationship behind.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: At seventeen, Dimitrius has already had three children and now four additional women claim to be pregnant with his baby. Then Ethel and her daughters need Steve's help to right their wrongs and get their family back on track.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jeanette witnessed her husband John kissing a man named Russell, who was living with them, but John claims that Russell was trying to homewreck. Then Vanessa is desperate to put an end to her boyfriend Robert's constant accusations of cheating.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Broderick has been an exemplary father to his 5 children, all of whom he's had to raise alone because their mother Renita abandoned them. They refuse to watch their youngest brother BJ grow up motherless and want Renita to wake up!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: 17-year-old Megan has been living with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. He doesn't allow her to go to school, get a job, eat when she wants, or even leave the house without his permission. Will Megan listen to her aunt and let Steve help her?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kyle niega ser el padre del hijo de Citasia. Su mamá dice que él miente. Entonces, Josh tuvo cinco hijos. Dana dice que más vale que se prepare para el sexto porque ella dice que es el padre de su bebé.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maury dice: "¡Tú SÍ eres el padre!" ¿Pero son esas las palabras que los presuntos padres nerviosos quieren oír? ¿O "Tú NO eres el padre" pondrá a las madres en shock? ¡Averigua los resultados en el MAURY de hoy!

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marfil planea el secuestro de Diana con la ayuda de Andrés y de Ignacio.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marfil llena de odio contra Deborah por usurpar su identidad, y con Diana por el hijo que tiene de Maximiliano, cobra venganza y las manda secuestrar juntas con Ignacio y Andrés.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Natalia, toma veneno para lograr el perdón de Ricardo. Ricardo viendo que está tan enferma, se conmueve y la recibe junto a Mariana. Consiguen salvarla y él le pide a su padre que le permita regresar a su hogar.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Esteban le cuenta a Willy la verdad sobre el chantaje de Margot, a cambio de fingir que él y Mariana eran amantes, de modo que más tarde Margot se acostaría con él. Por eso fue ella quien mandó a golpearlo.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Rosa y Natalia hacen planes para contarle a Luciano que Ricardo es su nieto y, por lo tanto, obtener dinero. Por eso están poniendo a Ricardo contra Mariana y a su padre a favor de ellas.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Panchita advierte a Saladino que Verónica y Santiago van a casarse, porque están enamorados. Mariana quiere hablar con Elena, pero ella se niega y le advierte que ya no son amigas.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Guillermo recorren las adyacencias de la hacienda Arismendi, esperando encontrar el paradero de Jimena y su hijo. Eva recurre a su hábil engaño para evitar un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario es testigo del arrepentimiento de Jimena, al recibir de su parte el deseo de ser perdonada por su errónea actitud y la información acerca de su paradero.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve enfrentada una ves mas con los enfermizo celos de Patricio quien al sospechar de su infidelidad la obliga a confesarle sus sentimientos y la amenza diciendole de nunca dejarla ser feliz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se encuentra con la abuela de Rosaura, teniendo así la oportunidad de explicarle a Doña Cruz los sentimientos que alberga por la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Marfil llena de odio contra Deborah por usurpar su identidad, y con Diana por el hijo que tiene de Maximiliano, cobra venganza y las manda secuestrar juntas con Ignacio y Andrés.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Lala sufre al ver cómo su hijo hace sufrir a Paola y a Caramelo con sus mentiras y engaños.

programme.title: Acorralada

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Luffy picks a fight with himself, Chopper falls in with a dubious crowd of imitation pirates, and Zorro causes a commotion when he falls asleep on the wrong ship!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally make it to Fish-Man Island, but their reputation precedes them, leading to trouble with the New Fish-Man Pirates! Only a daring maneuver can get them out of hot water, but there's no guarantee they'll survive!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Sanji gets up close and personal with a mesmerizing mermaid, his extreme fondness for the female form lands him in a life and death situation. Could the Straw Hat chef die from a nosebleed?!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When coming to a xenophobic isolationist planet, Captain Kirk and his landing party are punished for trespassing.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: When the Enterprise brings aboard Klingon prisoners, an alien entity pits both sides against each other in an ever-escalating struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is trapped in interphase, while the Enterprise is trapped by a powerful energy web.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must escort an alien princess to her marriage to seal an interplanetary alliance. In their journey, she becomes attracted to Kirk.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Wanting to maintain diplomatic relations, Sheppard and McKay accompany Harmony, a precocious young princess, on a mandatory rite of passage. However, they are unaware that she has enemies, and character flaws, yet to be dealt with.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: When Lt. Colonel John Sheppard receives word that his father has passed away he returns to Earth. But once there, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous experiment gone awry—a human form Replicator now on the loose that must be recaptured at all cost.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an off-world mission in a village rocked by fierce tremors, Col. Samantha Carter, Dr. McKay, and Dr. Keller become trapped when they fall into a sinkhole. But every attempt to escape the confines of the chamber puts them in further jeopardy.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The IOA has entrusted Mr. Coolidge, with interviewing Teyla Emmagan and Ronan Dex about their suitability to continue with the Atlantis expedition. Unbeknownst to anyone, a plan by the Wraith to invade the Midway station is about to be initiated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla, more determined than ever to find the missing Athosians, convinces Sheppard to travel with her to a trading settlement in search for answers. What they find there leads them to startling discovery that no one could have anticipated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After an unforeseen return, Dr. Carson Beckett shares that he has been held captive. As Teyla is re-united with some missing fellow Athosians, she begins to formulate a plan to ensure their escape, if she is able to find them in time.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Dwindling supplies, tedious routines, and low morale continue to plague the crew of the Destiny when the ship suddenly drops out of FTL and enters the orbit of an uncharted star. But, for the first time, the countdown clock doesn’t activate!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Disregarding orders, Dr. Rush links himself to the Destiny’s computer via the neural interface chair, hoping it will reveal the code needed to control Destiny’s flight path. Learning of this, Col. Young struggles with letting Rush risk his life.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Trapped beneath ruins in an underground maze, some of the Destiny's crew are stranded when the ship jumps back into FTL. The situation grows even more desperate when Rush (Robert Carlyle) learns that Destiny will soon be leaving the galaxy!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With crew members stranded, Destiny continues to cross from the present galaxy into the next one. Unable to alter the Destiny's course, Dr. Rush calculates the Destiny will fall short of making it to the next galaxy, stranding them indefinitely.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A giant insect has bitten Teal'c (Christopher Judge) and soon his body will transform into a cocoon and give birth to hundreds of insect aliens. Can the SG-1 team capture one of the bugs, extract the venom and save Teal'c before it's too late?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Captain Carter unwillingly becomes the host to a dying Tok'ra, a member of the resistance whose noble goal is to overthrow the evil Goa'uld empire. Now she sees through the Tok'ra's eyes, but can her visions help the SG-1 team save the Tok'ra?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra are desperate for hosts so they can continue fighting the Goa'uld. Carter's father, who is dying of cancer, has nothing to lose by volunteering his body. But will he die during the transference...or does fate have something else in store?

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When the Heinous Museum is under attack, Heloise and Jimmy are pressed into security service. --- Lucius and the Weavils sign a peace treaty forcing Beezy to marry the unsightly Princess Weavil.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Jimmy starts spending all his time with Beezy, Heloise decides to teach the boys a lesson. --- When an obsessed bus driver adopts Jimmy as his new best friend, it’s all buses, all the time.

programme.desc: Beezy is jealous when his new pet rock favors Jimmy. --- Jimmy poses as Molotov and joins Lucius on the mission to defeat the horrible ‘Moon Beast’.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes
programme.desc: When Miseryville goes into hibernation, Jimmy is the only one left awake. --- After Lucius loses his voice barking orders for his birthday party, Jimmy steps in to interpret the instructions.

programme.desc: Jimmy and Beezy take to nature when they decide there are too many rules in Miseryville, man. --- When Cerbee runs off with Jimmy's home, Heloise and Beezy fight over who gets Jimmy as a houseguest.

programme.desc: After a bad experience at Meh Burger, Amy decides to open her restaurant. / A second Knuckles from an alternate dimension becomes stranded in their world and causes trouble for Sonic and his friends.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man is physically controlled by Betrayus when he swallows a special micro-chip, and Pac's friends must help him infiltrate the Netherworld spy-style to retrieve the remote controller.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los aliados de Verónica la comparan con Antonia. Ricardo está desesperado por encontrar a su madre y sospecha que se esconde tras una burka en la Fortaleza. La policía encuentra a Alberto gravemente herido en plena calle. Lagarto detiene a Max.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Max tiene una coartada y Valentina la corrobora. David visita a su tío en la cárcel y se reconcilian. Verónica visita al moribundo Alberto y luego de enumerarle sus horribles crímenes, le revela su identidad. Constanza se abre ante su hijo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le dice a Ricardo que Alberto está en pleno uso de sus facultades mentales y puede rendir testimonio de la agresión. Pero los dos llegan muy tarde. Fríamente, Antonia le corta el flujo de aire y le habla a su examante, mientras lo ve morir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Raquel habla con Ruth, le ruega que regrese a casa y ella se niega, Juan le pide que respete esa decisión. Memo planea otro accidente para matar a Armando, esta vez espera no fallar.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los matones de Armando le cuentan al jefe que Rosario está viviendo con Memo, van a buscarla pero ella escapa. Jimena visita a Ruth, le brinda su apoyo incondicional en momentos tan difíciles.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora está en la hacienda, sus matones secuestran a Juan. Gabriela reflexiona y ahora solo quiere la felicidad de Norma, mientras Sara le confiesa a su madre de quién está enamorada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Llevan a Juan a la casa de torturas de Dínora, la policía sospecha de ella y de Fernando. Óscar y Franco encuentran el auto de su hermano con manchas de sangre, están muy preocupados.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Llega el día del matrimonio de Guadalupe y Gaspar, al que se espera que asista Eleuterio. Paula arriesga su amor por Juan para salvar a su madre de la cárcel, pero él empieza a sospechar que José está detrás del rechazo de la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Por fin, Lupe y Gaspar se casan y en medio del día más feliz de sus vidas, ella sufre la ausencia de su padre en la boda. Juan encuentra a José borracho presionando a Paula para besarla. Emilio acude al hospital para iniciar el plan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula sale ilesa del ataque de cinco alacranes que encuentra en su cama y, enfurecida, acusa a Julieta, quien niega tener algo que ver con lo sucedido. Pedro la defiende, aunque la nota extraña y agresiva, ella se queja de sufrir dolores de cabeza.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Paula le miente a Juan asegurándole que está enamorada de otro hombre, pero él no le cree y está seguro de que algo esconde. José chantajea y trata de obligar a Beatriz a estar con él. Julieta no sabe la razón de sus acciones, se siente confundida.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los aliados de Verónica la comparan con Antonia. Ricardo está desesperado por encontrar a su madre y sospecha que se esconde tras una burka en la Fortaleza. La policía encuentra a Alberto gravemente herido en plena calle. Lagarto detiene a Max.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he visits the tropical island of Borneo in Malaysia where he comes face-to-face with unique proboscis monkeys.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top Predators
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six ravenous encounters with mighty carnivores at the top of the food chain. Grizzly bears, Nile crocs, lions, African wild dogs, tiger sharks and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Amazing Baby Animals
programme.desc: The cuddly and rambunctious world of baby animals is always filled with fun and surprises. From orangutans and manatees to mountain gorillas, join in as Jack counts down ten moments of magic and mayhem with animal babies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Asia to visit the Singapore Zoo. Regarded as one of the top zoos in the world, this open-concept park is full of surprises for Jack and Sue, like orangutans swinging in the trees just feet above their heads

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animals and Traditions
programme.desc: Today, meet Kenya’s Masai cattle herders, Thailand’s mahouts and their elephants, the cowboys down south in South America, plus many more cultured creatures on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rescued
programme.desc: Come along on an amazing adventure with some remarkable animals, like endangered cheetahs, an orphaned wombat, and even a grey whale, that are getting a second chance.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he journeys to Lake Nakuru National Park where wildlife is prospering in Central Kenya. The thriving ecosystem is home to more than a million flamingos, endangered white and black rhinos, and the rare Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack as he heads to Florida's gulf coast! He and wife Sue learn the truth behind the legends of manatees and mermaids. Then, they get a once-in-a-lifetime experience swimming with manatees in Crystal River.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: At a training center of Canine Companions for Independence, Jack learns how dogs are trained to assist the disabled. From volunteer-raised puppies to graduates of the advanced training program, CCI dogs are something special.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Ancient Animals
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down the mammals, reptiles and birds that have hardly changed since prehistoric times.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Home Turf
programme.desc: Meet the animals that are masters of their domain. These creatures know how to protect their territories and themselves. Hippos, elephants, guanacos, elephant seals and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and Sue pack their bags and head to Alberta, Canada! Come along as they encounter wild moose in the Canadian Rockies, cross paths with bighorn sheep and spot a gang of travelling elk.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Helpers
programme.desc: Prepare to be amazed by seven true stories of some truly remarkable service animals on today’s Wild Countdown! From K-9 cops to dolphin detectives, we’re counting down seven remarkable animal super stars!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family travel into the mountain gorillas' homeland, deep in the jungles of Rwanda's Volcanoes National Park. With only 700 of these great apes left in the wild, they learn first-hand what's being done to save the gentle giants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathleen share a boating adventure exploring the animal-rich rainforest surrounding the Panama Canal, including Howler and Capuchin monkeys and the deadly Fer de Lance snake.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Second Chances
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is meeting several lucky creatures that are getting a second chance at survival, with a little help from their friends. Gibbons, horses, sloths, and even a pigeon!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Help Wanted
programme.desc: There’s no job too big or small for Jungle Jack as he gets to work as a horse farrier, baboon crossing guard, beekeeper and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for six of his all-time scariest safaris. Come along as he comes face-to-face with Alligators, Lions, Elephants, Cheetah, Tigers and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack treks deep into the rainforests of Gabon in search of Mandrills. The elusive and brightly colored primates are the largest monkeys in the world, and can only be found in Africa's equatorial rainforests.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: It's a Colorful Life
programme.desc: Wild animals flaunt their colors for all sorts of reasons: to send a warning, to attract a mate and sometimes, it’s just something they ate! Today, Jack is counting down seven amazing animals that aren’t shy about showing their true colors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: While in Barro Colorado, a dense forested island in Panama, Jack goes in search of a Harpy the world's largest eagle. The island is home to the famed Smithsonian Tropical Research Institute.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he discovers the survival secrets of crafty prey species. Wildebeest, Zebra, Wombats, Poison Dart Frogs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's epic adventure to the Serengeti unfolds with a once-in-a-lifetime look at the great migration of wildebeest and zebra. Then Jack encounters elephants, lions, and an African rock python and he pays a visit to a local school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living on the Edge
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack Hanna as he counts down the species that live their lives where other creatures fear to tread – right on the edge!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild

programme.title: The Love Boat

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing develops an unusual relationship with a lovely woman who is tasked with painting his portrait.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Gopher is shocked when he finds his old college roommate is different than he remembers. At the same time, an embittered and retired pianist agrees to perform again in order to pay for a handicapped woman's surgery.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A man falls in love with a beautiful woman who believes the couple was married in a past life 100 years earlier. The crew's amusement at Julie's new hairstyle creates pandemonium.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A female doctor's temperature rises when she meets Isaac, who tries to avoid his physical exam so he can hide a congenital condition. Meanwhile, a young woman and her mother learn devastating truths about each other when they meet the daughter's fiance.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: While the captain's daughter falls for Gopher, a book publisher flips a page in the book of love when trying to sign a burly author who happens to be accompanied by his attractive niece. Plus, an unusual couple looks for treasure.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Crew members become matchmakers when a man offers a handsome reward to anyone who can find him a good woman. Plus, a teen girl traveling with her mother faces potential humiliation when she runs into a former boyfriend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A doctor and his lawyer girlfriend find their relationship on trial when he meets an old friend. Meanwhile, Gopher flips for his former schoolteacher, and a young man tries to impress his father when he meets two women.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain and his crew suspect that a beautiful woman is trying to kill her millionaire husband, while a glamorous divorcee (Eva Gabor) tries to get reacquainted with her son, who prefers the company of his father.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are shocked to see the girl's long-lost father entertaining passengers as the cruise comedian. Plus, a teenager pursues Gopher and drastically changes her appearance to try and catch his eye.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When a former medical-school friend (James Noble) becomes the center of attention, Doc wonders if he made the right career decision. Meanwhile, a reticent computer genius tries to win the affection of a woman who has eyes for another man

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing and his crew host passengers and their pooches for the Honeycutt $10.000 Dog Show competition commencing in Acapulco.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A famous diamond is stolen from a museum in Istanbul just as the Pacific Princess is sailing the Aegean Sea. Doc proposes marriage to a beautiful woman who is more interested in someone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Handwriting Analysis: We've all heard that our handwriting tells more about our personalities than we think. Are we risk-takers, have low-esteem, fun loving, or are we capable of murder?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new bank opens and Banker Hamilton hires a slow-witted gunman to guard the safe. When some of the gunman's old outlaw friends arrive in town they propose he join them in robbing the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission; in the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel; Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop; after a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons; Ezekiel helps hospital patients in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl Dixon's arrival to France sets off a violent chain of events that inadvertently puts a young boy at the heart of a growing religious movement in danger; Daryl agrees to help shepherd the boy to safety in exchange for help returning to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl, Isabelle, Laurent and Sylvie face trouble on the road; Isabelle remembers the day the hungry ones appeared; Laurent struggles to fit in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En una heroica misión de rescate, algunos miembros del grupo deben volver a un lugar familiar. El escenario será tan grande como el riesgo de la misión.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Atareado con la resistencia en la iglesia y con una misión de rescate, el grupo podría colapsar. ¿Será este un punto de ruptura para los sobrevivientes?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las reglas y la moral son dejadas de lado a causa de nuevos enemigos. Rick intentará conseguir un acuerdo pacífico, pero ellos podrían preferir la violencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de todas las dificultades que el grupo enfrentó, un pequeño desvío podría ser la solución que buscaban.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La vida a la intemperie dejó al grupo golpeado y atormentado. ¿Serán capaces de continuar esa marcha penosa? ¿Son siquiera las mismas personas que alguna vez fueron?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Durante una tormenta espectacular, Rick y el grupo conocen a unas personas aparentemente amistosas. ¿Serán dignas de confianza, o solo intentan manipular a Rick?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Adaptarse a un nuevo estilo de vida resulta difícil para el grupo. Quizás la vida en la carretera haya sido demasiado traicionera para que vuelvan a ser lo que alguna vez fueron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo continúan la adaptación a su nuevo entorno. ¿Serán capaces de volver a la normalidad? O mejor aún, ¿qué es lo normal ahora?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo enfrentan desafíos que ponen en riesgo su vida mientras intentan que su nuevo hogar sea un lugar seguro. ¿Valdrá realmente la pena esa nueva utopía?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo descubre, poco a poco, que la vida en su refugio empieza a replicar las adversidades que enfrentaron afuera. ¿Podrá Rick soportarlo?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl está en peligro, mientras Rick y el grupo continúan sintiendo que no pertenecen a Alexandria, donde los problemas comienzan a filtrarse.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Primera vez de nuevo (S6 Ep1)
programme.desc: Rick y el grupo aún tienen problemas para adaptarse en Alexandria. ¿Podrá una nueva amenaza unirlos o separarlos aún más?

programme.title: The Walking Dead: JSS (S6 Ep2)
programme.desc: Justo cuando parece que las cosas pueden retornar a la normalidad, o tan normal como se pueda en el apocalipsis, un nuevo problema aparece para los habitantes de Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Gracias (S6 Ep3)
programme.desc: Un regreso a casa no resulta como lo esperado.
